mapper.sql: SELECT v.wave_id, v.wave_no, v.wave_name, v.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, v.status, v.total_qty, v.order_count, v.del_flag, v.create_by, v.create_time, v.update_by, v.update_time, v.remark FROM wms_wave v LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON v.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_wave (wave_no, wave_name, warehouse_id, status, total_qty, order_count, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{waveNo}, #{waveName}, #{warehouseId}, #{status}, #{totalQty}, #{orderCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_wave SET del_flag = '2' WHERE wave_id IN #{waveId}
